title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, manage, and run large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models, enabling chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama with chat history, model management, and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java client library for Ollama, supporting synchronous and asynchronous operations.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced command-line wrapper for Ollama with interactive prompts and output formatting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension backed by local Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that brings local LLM chat to any server via Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible builds and development shells for Ollama.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI/CD pipelines that need to spin up Ollama services.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration enabling Ollama models in retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration and starter for embedding Ollama in Java applications.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with support for chat, completion, and embedding endpoints.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing strongly-typed bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir library wrapping the Ollama API with GenServer-based process management.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Reference implementation of retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama and Chroma.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds local LLM assistance to your knowledge base via Ollama.
